content.en:
Terran, the well of origin.

Ye Tian was in retreat at the Origin Well, this Origin Well was snatched by him, the Origin Realm was shattered and integrated into the main world, and the Origin Well of the Origin Realm naturally fell into the main world.

The Origin Well is very rare, although it is difficult to find, but Ye Tian still got the news of an Origin Well, and snatched it with a strong hand, and moved to the Terran territory.

It's a pity that he doesn't know the news of other origin wells, otherwise he will definitely be able to find more origins for the human race and strengthen the human race.

In the 50,000 years of retreat in the Source Well, Ye Tian has made great progress, beyond the imagination of others.

The Burning Fire Forging Soul Technique has been cultivated to the peak of the third layer, and the third transformation has been completed, and the Constant Light Divine Power has stepped into the peak realm of Xiaocheng, and the Great Immortal Technique and the Great Destruction Technique have stepped into the realm of Xiaocheng, and their power has skyrocketed.

In addition, the Void Heaven Diagram has also improved slightly, and with his efforts, he has finally reached the level of twenty percent of his comprehension, but it is a pity that he still does not know what the Void Heaven Diagram is for, and even if he has comprehended it so far, he seems to have gained nothing.

However, this is the only way for him to become a disciple of his own lineage, and even if it is really useless, he will continue to meditate.

At this moment, Ye Tian was attacking the fourth layer realm of the Xuanxu Jue.

After 50,000 years of penance, coupled with many resources, the shackles of the third to fourth layers of the Xuanxu Jue were finally broken, and only the last step was left.

And now he is going to break the shackles and be promoted to the fourth level of entry realm.

Once he breaks through, his strength will inevitably increase amazingly.

As time passed, Ye Tian's aura became stronger and stronger, and a large amount of origin water around him fused into his body, helping him to impact the shackles.

Finally, at a certain moment, Ye Tian's breath skyrocketed, and his body cracked and healed, repeatedly.

"Xuanxuan Jue, the fourth layer is broken!"

Ye Tian shouted silently.

Bang!!!

Ye Tian's physical body truly broke the limit and stepped into a whole new level.

At the same time, the countless top-grade divine crystals, chaos crystals, and other energy crystals that had been prepared for a long time all turned into energy and poured into Ye Tian's body, helping him quickly complete the transformation of his physical body.

After a long time, Ye Tian stabilized the realm.

"Finally broke through, as soon as the physical body transformed, my strength skyrocketed, coupled with the improvement of my supernatural powers, now my strength may have reached the strength of the peak of three stars!"

Ye Tian guessed.

The further back the god-level combat power, each small level, the gap is very large, although the Xuanxuan Jue is powerful, but it will not break a realm, and improve the strength of a star, that is unlikely.

However, the Xuanxuan Jue has already entered the fourth layer, and if it is promoted to the fourth level of Dacheng realm, even if it is not improved in other aspects, it may be able to break the shackles and become a four-star god general.

And Xuanxuan Jue didn't have much shackles from the fourth layer to the Dacheng realm, only the process of water grinding remained, so it was not much difficult for Ye Tian to become a four-star god general.

It can be said that Ye Tian is now equivalent to a quasi-four-star god general.

......

When Ye Tian came out of the Origin Well, several Earth Venerables appeared in front of Ye Tian.

These Earth Venerables are Kunwu Dizun and Mixed Yuan Dizun and others, and they are also the pillars of Renzun today, but it is a few of them who really manage the human race, but Ye Tian rarely manages the human race.

"Ten thousand law gods, there are some races that say they want to vote for our human race. "

Mixed Yuan Honorable Dao.

"There is a race to take refuge!"

Ye Tian was not surprised at all about this, in today's cosmic environment, many cosmic races were in danger, and if they didn't have a backer, they would be wiped out at any time.

And the Terran is undoubtedly the largest force in the universe now, and there are naturally many forces that want to take refuge in the Terran.

"Take it first, but if you have a bad relationship with the Terrans, or if you want to take refuge but don't listen to orders, then don't. Ye Tiandao.

"Yes!"

Mixed Yuan Honorable Dao.

"Is there any news from the Cangyu Universe?"

Ye Tian asked again.

The fourth deity and the third deity have already been recovered, so he doesn't know much about the situation in the Cangyu Universe, and the human race has some strong people in the Cangyu Universe, and the Mixed Yuan Earth Venerable can contact each other and follow up the information all the time.

Therefore, they were very aware of the situation in the Cangyu Universe.

"Ten Thousand Law Divine Generals, the development of the Cangyu Universe is also very good, but they are already at a peak, so the development progress is not much, our Eternal Universe is not as good as them in addition to the number of Divine Generals, but the level of the Earth Venerable is gradually catching up. However, there was a piece of information from the Cangyu Universe recently, and a two-star god general had fallen from the Cangyu Universe, and it seemed that several gods of the Tibetan God Organization had joined forces to kill him, and the killing speed was too fast, and the other gods would not have time to rescue him. "

Mixed Yuan Dizun reported.

"What, the two-star god will be killed in a short time?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"Yes!" Mixed Yuan Dizun nodded, "As for the reason, I don't know very well, but that two-star god general was killed at the entrance of the forbidden area of the Cangyu universe, and now many god generals have broken into that forbidden area, maybe they found some chance, which caused the Tibetan God Organization to fight with the two-star god general, but the two-star god general was killed before he had time to escape!"

"What a chance!"

Ye Tian was a little moved.

Although he is now a three-star peak god general, it is estimated that it will take hundreds of thousands of years to become a four-star god general, but if there is a great opportunity, he may be able to break through in a few thousand years.

In the universe, if there is no chance and resources, even if the inheritance is good, it will be difficult to rush to the four-star god general in a short time, but if there is a big opportunity, even if the inheritance is average, it can become a four-star god general in a short time.

It had been less than 10 million years since the Dual Universe merged, and he had to take any opportunity.

"Mixed Yuan Earth Venerable, Kunwu Earth Venerable, I'm going to go to the Cangyu Universe, you guys take good care of the human race, if there is anything, notify me immediately!" Ye Tian admonished.

"Yes!"

Mixed Yuan Dizun and Kunwu Dizun nodded.

They also knew Ye Tian's strength, he was absolutely invincible in the dual universe, even if it was the forbidden area of the Cangyu universe, Ye Tian would not have anything, unless all the gods would besiege Ye Tian, it would bring a trace of trouble to Ye Tian.

But it's just trouble, if Ye Tian wants to leave, no one can stop him.

Wow!

Ye Tian kept shuttling, and it took a little time to come to the Dual Universe Black Hole node.

At this moment, a large number of regions of the dual universe have been fused, and the area that has been fused has become continents, and even countless giant cities have been built on them for the forces of the two sides of the dual universe to trade.

There are even people who live here and make it their home.

And here there is also a name - New Universe!

Ye Tian did not stay in the new universe for long, but quickly shuttled into the Cangyu universe.
